title: Add Psionic non-record runtime replay submission
author: AtlantisPleb

data.description: Shipped prebuilt Psionic runtime payload launched by a root-local train_gpt.py wrapper to replay the bounded local-reference validation path and emit runtime receipts.

novel_contributions: Non-record submission package for the bounded local-reference lane
Shipped prebuilt runtime payload executed via train_gpt.py
Replay-verification and runtime-receipt artifacts included in the submission
Int8 + zlib roundtrip export of the model artifact
